notes: Three.js r128 via CDN. 4 characters (MJ, Pepe, Trump, Elon) with distinct appearances. Multi-light cinematic setup (spotlight + 3 colored point lights + ambient). Stage with tombstones, wet reflective floor, moon with glow. FogExp2 + additive-blend particle fog. Thriller dance animation: zombie reach, T-pose, MJ arm raise, leg shuffle. 4 camera modes (front, side, orbit, close-up). Speed toggle.
